ts.meta.title: Token Sender - BiuBiu Tools
ts.meta.description: Batch-send native coins or ERC20 tokens to many addresses at once — from your own passkey self-custodial wallet, using Safe 1.4.1 MultiSend.
ts.title: Token Sender
ts.subtitle: Send a coin or token to many addresses at once — from your own wallet.
ts.safety.heading: Your keys, your coins
ts.safety.detailBefore: Funds sit in a Safe smart account whose address is derived from your passkey — the private key never leaves your device, and every batch needs your fingerprint / PIN. Same design as
ts.step1.heading: Choose network & token
ts.step1.customNetworkNoteBefore: Custom network: reading balances & tokens works here, but
ts.step1.customNetworkNoteAfter: needs Safe infra + bundler support on this chain — set it up via
ts.step2.heading: Add recipients
ts.step3.heading: Review & fee
ts.step3.topUpHint: Top up your wallet with {symbol}, then come back.
ts.step3.customNetworkNoteBefore: This is a custom network — sending isn't enabled yet. Use a built-in network, or set up Safe infra via
ts.step4.heading: Sending
ts.step4.approveHint: Approve each batch in your wallet when prompted.
ts.step4.aborted: Paused — {sent} batch(es) sent, {failed} failed/skipped. You can continue below.
ts.history.heading: History
ts.addNetwork.title: Add custom network
ts.addNetwork.name: Network name
ts.addNetwork.multiSendOk: ✓ Safe MultiSend 1.4.1 found — sending may work once Safe infra is present
ts.addNetwork.multiSendMissing: ⚠ MultiSend 1.4.1 not found here — reads only until Safe infra is deployed
ts.addNetwork.footnote: Custom chains are read-capable now; sending also requires Safe 1.4.1 + bundler support on that chain.
ts.addNetwork.errorRequired: Name, chain ID and RPC are required
ts.rpc.title: RPC · {name}
ts.rpc.note: Used for reading balances, token info and price. First reachable one is used.
ts.errors.tokenMetaFailed: Couldn't read the token — check the address and network
ts.gate.title: Connect a wallet to start
ts.gate.desc: You send from your own self-custodial wallet — a passkey wallet, a browser wallet, or paired by QR. Your funds stay in your hands, and you approve every batch yourself.
ts.step2.largeWarning: That's about {batches} wallet approvals (one per 100 recipients). For a smooth send, keep each run to ~1,000 addresses and split longer lists into a few sends.
ts.step3.approvalsNote: You'll approve {count} time(s) in your wallet — one per batch. Keep this tab open until it finishes.
